user.title: Set up DIVERA 24/7
user.description: Enter your DIVERA API key. You can find it in DIVERA under Settings → DEBUG → Accesskey.

select_ucr.title: Select unit
select_ucr.description: Select the unit whose alarms should be displayed.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check the key and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the DIVERA server. Please check your internet connection.

abort.no_units: No units found for this API key.
